title: Freeze Dried Squishies Pouch 50g - Pack of 3
features: Freeze Dried Squishies Pouch 50g - Pack of 3

Inside each pouch, you'll find raspberry & milk, bubblegum, banana & blueberry, and sour apple & cherry flavoured sweet
